---
title: "Samuel Márquez Estrada"
image: "Samuel.JPG"
links:
  - label: '`r fontawesome::fa(name = "github", fill = "steelblue")` Github'
    url: "https://github.com/SamuelMarEs/"
  - label: '`r fontawesome::fa(name = "envelope", fill = "steelblue")` Mail'
    url: "samuelmares381@gmail.com"
output:
  postcards::jolla
---
```{r load_packages, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, include=FALSE} 
library(fontawesome)
```

#### **Bio** 
I am passionate about probability and statistics, and I have a special interest in Data Science and Machine Learning. I have intermediate knowledge of Python and C++. I am currently learning R, SQL, and Python for ML. My dream is to work on creating machine learning models and developing artificial intelligence.


#### **Education**
I am currently a third-semester student in the Bachelor's degree in Mathematics for Development at UNAM, ENES Juriquilla.
